race.comment: LIGHT FILLED (9) comes here off a 40-day let up looking very well placed. She was in the market when last seen at Donald but didn't quite fire having shown good ability last time in work. Tipping she can bounce back to form here and take catching. HEGELY (7) put in the best effort of her campaign last time at Donald when beaten a nose after making up good ground. She lands in a nice spot here and will take beating. GAMADALE PADDY (12) struggled on debut in a good race at Warrnambool on heavy going but he can bounce back quickly. IMMORTAL TRUTH (8) can mix her form a bit but has claims on best.
